name: gsr
description: PRD-first, human-in-the-loop workflow for building production apps. From raw idea to verified MVP.

commands.name: gsr:scope
commands.description: Shape idea or existing materials into structured scope

commands.name: gsr:prd
commands.description: Generate PRD + feature files + project infrastructure

commands.name: gsr:build
commands.description: Build a specific feature (creative or systematic mode)

commands.name: gsr:verify
commands.description: Verify a feature or phase against PRD criteria

commands.name: gsr:learn
commands.description: Index an existing codebase to onboard GSR
